results.rendered_html:
ṣaṣṭhī
1 The sixth day of a lunar fortnight
2 The sixth or genitive case (in gram.).
3 An epithet of Durgā in the form of Kātyāyanī, one of the 16 divine mothers.
Comp.
— tatpuruṣaḥ the genitive Tatpurusha compound, one in which, when dissolved, the first member usually stands in the genitive case.
— pūjanaṃ, -pūjā worship of the goddess ṣaṣṭhī performed on the sixth day after a woman's delivery.
